title: Monitoring and Alerting Setup
input_format: Service configuration with name, SLO targets (availability %, latency P99), and alert channels
output_format: Prometheus recording rules YAML, alert rules YAML, Grafana dashboard JSON, and Alertmanager config YAML
example_output: Complete monitoring config with recording rules, multi-burn-rate alerts, RED dashboard, and alert routing
constraints:
- Must define recording rules for SLIs
- Alerts must use multi-burn-rate approach
- Dashboard must show RED metrics
- Alert routing must match severity to channels
function_signature: function generateMonitoringConfig(config: { serviceName: string; slo: { availability: number; latencyP99Ms: number }; alertChannels: string[] }): { prometheusRules: string; grafanaDashboard: string; alertmanagerConfig: string }
